DROP TABLE [EDW].[DIM_FINANCE_COMPANY]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[DIM_FINANCE_COMPANY]
( 
	[FinanceCompanyID] [nvarchar](50)  NOT NULL,
	[FinanceCompany] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[Active] [bit]  NULL,
	[LP_FinanceCompanyID] [int]  NULL,
	[Division] [nvarchar](10)  NOT NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] [DATETIME]  NOT NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE
)
GO
